description: Your observatory database contains the 2024-01-01 Noto Peninsula mainshock, but the aftershock from the same day is missing. Import the aftershock event from /home/ga/Desktop/aftershock_data.xml into the SeisComP database with the event type set to 'earthquake' and preferred magnitude type 'Mw(mB)'. Export a formatted event bulletin containing the magnitudes and locations for both the mainshock and aftershock to /home/ga/Desktop/event_comparison.txt.
